title: Session Metrics Envelope v1.0.0
description: Standard telemetry envelope capturing runtime entertainment metrics (UEC, EMD, STCI, CDL, ARR) for analysis and spine index updates.

version.description: Schema version of this telemetry envelope.

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for the play session.

regionId.description: ID of the region where these metrics were captured.

UEC.description: User Engagement Continuity: session-level engagement stability.

EMD.description: Experience Modulation Delta: rate of change in emotional valence.

STCI.description: Spectral Threat Confidence Interval: statistical threat uncertainty.

CDL.description: Cognitive Dissonance Level: narrative/mechanical contradiction intensity.

activeEventIds.description: List of events active during this capture window.

activePersonaIds.description: List of personas currently interacting with the player.

styleIds.description: List of styles influencing the current presentation.

prismMetaRef.description: Optional reference to the prismMeta governing this session's data linkage.
